name: Mama's Rhubarb and Strawberry Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the strawberries, hull them, and mash.
2. Press the rhubarb through a sieve.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the mashed fruit in a bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into a freezing tray or refrigerator container and freeze until firm.
5. When ready to serve, use an inverted spoon to scrape thin layers of the mixture from the tray.
6. Beat the scraped pieces back together until smooth.
7. Serve immediately.
